login.title: Admin Login
login.subtitle: Sign in with your username and password
login.rememberSession: Keep me signed in on this device
login.rememberHint: Your session stays active on this device (secure cookie); nothing is stored in browser scripts.
login.missingFields: The form arrived without a username or password — hard-refresh this page (Ctrl+F5) and try again
login.throttled: Too many failed attempts — try again in :seconds seconds
login.serverError: Could not create the session — try again
login.privacyNote: By checking 'Keep me signed in', you consent to a persistent authentication cookie on this device.
login.registerSuccess: Account created — sign in with your username and password

help.title: No account?
help.text: Accounts are created by an administrator (or the platform hosting this site). If you lost your password, ask your administrator to reset it.
help.textRegisterOpen: Use the link above to create your account. If you lost your password, ask your administrator to reset it.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Choose a public name, a username and a password
register.nameHint: How other users see and find you. Must be different from your username.
register.usernameHint: 3–32 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, dashes or underscores. This is your private sign-in identifier — other users know you by your public name.
register.passwordHint: At least :min characters — length matters more than symbols.
register.backToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
register.invalidUsername: This username is not valid — use 3–32 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, dashes or underscores
register.nameEqualsUsername: Your public name must be different from your username (your username stays private)
register.passwordTooShort: Password is too short — at least :min characters
register.missingFields: The form arrived incomplete — hard-refresh this page (Ctrl+F5) and try again
register.throttled: Too many attempts — try again in :seconds seconds
register.closed: Registration is closed on this installation (account limit reached)
register.disabled: Self-registration is disabled on this installation
register.serverError: Could not create the account — try again

logout.title: Logout
logout.message: You have been logged out successfully

memberships.title: My Memberships
memberships.subtitle: Your projects, invitations, join requests, proposals and notices — everything about where you belong.

myProjects.title: My projects
myProjects.empty: You are not a member of any project yet. Accept an invitation or send a join request below.
myProjects.leaveConfirm: You are about to leave {project}. You will need a fresh invitation to rejoin.

proposals.title: My proposals
proposals.hint: People you vouched for on your projects. A proposal that disappears without joining was either denied or answered by the person.

request.title: Request to join a project
request.hint: Ask to join a project by its id. The project must have an open join policy; your note is shown to its admins.
request.noteLabel: Why do you want to join?
request.noteRequired: The note is required — say why you want to join.
request.errUnavailable: This project does not accept join requests (or does not exist).
request.errClosed: This project's join requests are closed.
request.errAlreadyMember: You are already a member of this project.
request.errAlreadyInvited: You already have a pending invitation here — accept or decline it above.
request.errAlreadyRequested: You already asked — withdraw the request above to re-ask.
request.errNoticePending: A notice for this project is still in your inbox — dismiss it first.

members.title: Project Members
members.subtitle: Roster, invitations and join requests of the project you are editing.

roster.title: Roster
roster.empty: No members (this should not happen — a project always has its owner).

queue.title: Pending — invitations, requests & proposals
queue.approvedMsg: Approved — they are now a member
queue.convertedMsg: Proposal approved — invitation sent, awaiting their answer

invite.title: Invite someone
invite.hint: Look the person up by their EXACT public name, confirm the right account by its id, pick a role below yours, and send. They join only when they accept.
invite.noMatches: No account with this exact public name.
invite.nameRequired: Type the exact public name first.
invite.pickRequired: Search and select a person first.

propose.title: Propose a member
propose.hint: Vouch for someone: an admin or the owner validates your proposal before the person is even told. Your note IS the vouch — make it count.
propose.sentMsg: Proposal recorded — an admin or the owner must validate it

policy.title: Join policy
policy.hint: Open = anyone authenticated may send a join request (the self-service front door). Closed = requests bounce; invitations and member proposals always work. Closing never discards requests already pending.
policy.label: Self-service join requests
policy.advisory: Privacy note: this project is PRIVATE with an OPEN join policy — any authenticated account that knows or guesses its id can send a request and thereby learn the project exists.
policy.confirmOpenPrivate: This project is PRIVATE. Opening the join policy makes it knockable by id: anyone authenticated who knows or guesses the id can send a request and learn the project exists. Open anyway?

transfer.title: Transfer ownership
transfer.warn: Hands the project to another MEMBER. You keep the role chosen below. There is no undo from your side — only the new owner could transfer it back.
transfer.confirmLabel: I understand the project is handed over and my owner rights end.
transfer.modalBody: The project is handed to {name}. Your role becomes {role}. This cannot be undone from your side.
transfer.memberRequired: Pick the member who becomes the new owner.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your site through a friendly interface

projects.title: Project Manager
projects.restore_warning: A pre-restore backup will be created automatically.
projects.restoreWarningWithBackup: A backup of your current project will be created before restoring.
projects.restoreWarningNoBackup: Your current project state will be lost! Make sure you have a backup if needed.
projects.createBackupBeforeRestore: Create a backup of the current project before restoring
projects.backup_hint: Click "Backup" to create your first backup
projects.cloneTooltip: Duplicate this project with a new name
projects.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. The project and all its data will be permanently deleted.
projects.nameHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only
projects.activateAfterCreate: Switch to this project after creation

storage.title: Storage Overview
storage.backupsTip: Switch project to manage other projects’ backups.

history.title: Command History
history.subtitle: View executed commands and their results
history.noHistory: No commands have been executed yet
history.noHistoryFiltered: No command history found for the selected filters.
history.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear command history?

404.title: Page Not Found
404.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

500.title: Server Error
500.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.

optimize.title: Optimization Tools
optimize.subtitle: Analyze and clean up your project's CSS

cssRefiner.title: CSS Refiner
cssRefiner.subtitle: Find and fix redundancies, duplicates, and optimization opportunities
cssRefiner.emptyState: Click Analyze to scan your CSS for suggestions.
cssRefiner.libNotReady: CSS Refiner modules not yet installed. See integration notes.

autoRefineModal.title: Auto-Refine Summary
autoRefineModal.backupNote: A backup will be saved automatically.

sitemapPage.title: Sitemap
sitemapPage.subtitle: Manage your site routes and navigation structure
sitemapPage.allReachable: All routes are reachable from home
sitemapPage.linkGraphDesc: Each route and the routes it links to (via page content + menu + footer).
sitemapPage.unreachableHint: These routes have no navigation path from the home page. Add links to them in a page, menu, or footer.
sitemapPage.emptyHint: Add your first route to start building your site structure
sitemapPage.sitemapFileDesc: Generate a sitemap.txt file for search engines. Set the base URL to your production domain.
sitemapPage.customUrlsHint: Add extra URLs not generated from routes (one per line)

interactions.title: Interactions
interactions.subtitle: Manage interaction schemas and project interactions

schemas.title: Interaction Schemas
schemas.noCustomSchemasHint: Create custom schemas to extend the interaction system

form.handlerHint: JavaScript code to execute. 'params' object contains the parameter values.

instances.title: Project Interactions
instances.noInteractionsHint: Create interactions to add behavior to your site

form.triggerHint: CSS selector and event (e.g., #myBtn click, .card hover)

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Delete
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
deleteConfirm.schemaMessage: Are you sure you want to delete schema '{id}'? This cannot be undone.
deleteConfirm.interactionMessage: Are you sure you want to delete interaction '{id}'? This cannot be undone.

embedSecurity.title: Embed Security
embedSecurity.subtitle: Manage iframe sandbox rules and embed permissions

structure.title: Structure Viewer
structure.subtitle: Visual tree view of page and component structures

tree.title: Structure Tree
tree.empty: Select a structure type and name above to view

confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete ':name'? This component is used in :count place(s).

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.subtitle: Automated task sequences - manual or AI-assisted

intro.description: Use AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini...) to create complete websites via QuickSite commands.

chooseSpec.title: Choose a Spec
chooseSpec.hint: Select "Landing Page" for single-page sites or "Website" for multi-page.

describeGoal.title: Describe Your Goal
describeGoal.hint: Use an example or write your own description with details.

copyPrompt.title: Copy Full Prompt
copyPrompt.hint: The spec + your goal are combined and ready to paste.

importExecute.title: Import & Execute
importExecute.hint: Paste AI's JSON response and click Execute Now.

promptBuilder.title: What do you want to build?
promptBuilder.placeholder: Describe what you want to create...
promptBuilder.beSpecific: Be specific! The more details you provide, the better the AI output.

importResponse.title: Import AI Response
importResponse.hint: After sending the prompt to AI, paste its JSON response below

browser.title: Workflows
browser.subtitle: Generate AI-ready prompts for common QuickSite tasks
browser.step3: Copy the generated prompt to your AI assistant
browser.step4: Execute the AI response in the Command Queue
browser.invalidImport: Invalid import file: must contain spec and template

spec.editorHint: You can also run this workflow without leaving the visual editor — open Preview → AI tools.
spec.manualHint: This workflow executes predefined commands without AI
spec.noParamsHint: This workflow has no configurable parameters.
spec.stepsHint: This workflow will execute the following commands:

notFound.title: Workflow Not Found
notFound.message: The requested workflow could not be found.

spec.yourPromptPlaceholder: Describe your website: type, color theme, pages, style... Leave empty for a general result you can refine in the visual editor.
spec.promptPlaceholder: Fill in the parameters and click Generate to create a prompt...
spec.emptyPromptWarning: No user prompt provided. The AI will produce a generic result. Consider describing what you want for better output.

info.title: Creating a Custom Spec
info.text: Custom workflows are saved to the secure/admin/workflows/custom/ folder. They will appear alongside core workflows in the browser. Use the Translations tab to provide multilingual labels and descriptions for your workflow — they are saved as a sidecar file alongside your spec.

notFound.title: Workflow Not Found
notFound.message: The requested workflow could not be found for editing.

editor.validJson: Valid JSON - All required fields present
editor.fixErrors: Please fix JSON errors before previewing
editor.previewEmpty: Click "Preview" to see the rendered prompt

creation.title: Creation
creation.desc: Create new websites and pages from scratch

template.title: Templates
template.desc: Ready-to-use site templates - no AI required

content.title: Content
content.desc: Add or update page content and text

includeAssets.label: Include my starred assets in the prompt
includeAssets.help: The AI will use your starred assets (images, fonts, etc.) instead of placeholders. Star assets in the Asset Management page first.

includeFavicon.label: Include favicon documentation
includeFavicon.help: The AI will also receive editFavicon command docs and may set a favicon from your assets.

keepAssets.label: Keep existing assets during fresh start
keepAssets.help: Preserve your uploaded assets (images, fonts, etc.) when the project is reset before creation.

keepLanguages.label: Keep existing languages during fresh start
keepLanguages.help: Preserve your additional languages when the project is reset before creation.

addLanguage.title: Add Language
addLanguage.description: Add a new language to your multilingual website with translations and language switcher updates.

createLanding.title: Create Landing Page
createLanding.description: Generate a complete single-page landing website from scratch with hero, features, testimonials, and contact sections.

coffeeShop.title: Coffee Shop
coffeeShop.prompt: Create a landing page for a coffee shop with hero, menu highlights, and contact form

saas.title: SaaS Product
saas.prompt: Create a modern landing for a project management SaaS with features, pricing, testimonials

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.prompt: Create a minimalist portfolio landing for a photographer with gallery and contact

createWebsite.title: Create Multi-Page Website
createWebsite.description: Generate a complete multi-page website with navigation, multiple pages, shared header/footer, and consistent styling.

pages.label: Pages to create
pages.help: Comma-separated page names (home is always included)

business.title: Business
business.prompt: Create a professional website for a consulting firm with home, about, services, team, contact

restaurant.title: Restaurant
restaurant.prompt: Create a restaurant website with home, menu, about, gallery, reservations, contact

agency.title: Creative Agency
agency.prompt: Create a creative agency website with home, work, services, team, blog, contact

addPage.title: Add New Page
addPage.description: Add a new page to an existing website with proper navigation links and translations for all languages.

navPlacement.label: Navigation placement
navPlacement.help: Where to add the link to the new page

blog.title: Blog Page
blog.prompt: Add a blog page with recent articles list and category sidebar

faq.title: FAQ Page
faq.prompt: Add a FAQ page with collapsible questions organized by topic

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.prompt: Add a privacy policy page (footer link only) with GDPR-compliant sections

addSection.title: Add Section to Page
addSection.description: Add a new section to an existing page at a specific position (before/after another section).

targetPage.label: Target page
targetPage.help: Select the page to add the section to

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.prompt: Add a testimonials section after features with 3 customer quotes

cta.title: CTA Banner
cta.prompt: Add a call-to-action banner before footer with newsletter signup

stats.title: Statistics
stats.prompt: Add a statistics section with animated counters showing achievements

translateLanguage.title: Translate Content
translateLanguage.description: Translate all website content from the default language to a target language using natural, accurate translations.

targetLanguage.label: Target language
targetLanguage.help: Select the language to translate into

french.title: To French
french.prompt: Translate all content to French with formal tone

spanish.title: To Spanish
spanish.prompt: Translate to Spanish (Spain) with friendly tone

improve.title: Improve Existing
improve.prompt: Review and improve existing German translations for naturalness

globalDesign.title: Change Design Theme
globalDesign.description: Update the website's color scheme and design variables for a fresh look without changing structure.

darkMode.title: Dark Mode
darkMode.prompt: Convert to dark theme with dark backgrounds and light text

warmPalette.title: Warm Palette
warmPalette.prompt: Change to warm earth tones (oranges, browns, creams)

corporateBlue.title: Corporate Blue
corporateBlue.prompt: Apply professional blue corporate theme with navy and light blue

restyle.title: Restyle Website
restyle.description: Completely restyle the website's visual appearance including CSS rules, colors, typography, spacing, and effects.

minimalist.title: Minimalist
minimalist.prompt: Restyle with minimalist aesthetic: whitespace, clean typography, subtle shadows

boldColorful.title: Bold & Colorful
boldColorful.prompt: Make bold and vibrant with bright colors, large typography, dynamic elements

glassmorphism.title: Glassmorphism
glassmorphism.prompt: Apply glassmorphism with frosted glass effects, blur backgrounds, gradients

runBatch.title: Run Command Batch
runBatch.description: Paste and execute a JSON command batch directly — no prompt generation needed.

starterBusiness.title: Starter Business
starterBusiness.description: Business website with menu, footer, 4 pages and teal theme. Single language.

starterBusinessMultilingual.title: Starter Business (Multilingual)
starterBusinessMultilingual.description: Business website with EN + FR translations and dark amber theme.

landingPage.title: Landing Page
landingPage.description: Single-page landing with hero, features and CTA sections. Purple gradient theme.

landingPageMultilingual.title: Landing Page (Multilingual)
landingPageMultilingual.description: Single-page landing with EN + FR translations and language switcher.

buildAndDeploy.title: Build & Deploy
buildAndDeploy.description: Create a production build of your website and deploy it to a target server path in one step.

buildName.label: Build Name
buildName.help: A unique name to identify this build. Use the preset selector above to load values from an existing build, or type a new name to create a fresh one.

publicFolder.label: Public Folder
publicFolder.help: The web-accessible root folder name on the target server (usually the same as the one used for your QuickSite deployment)

secureFolder.label: Secure Folder
secureFolder.help: The folder for server-side files, placed as a sibling to the public folder on the target (not web-accessible)

spaceFolder.label: Space (URL sub-path)
spaceFolder.help: Optional sub-path inside the public folder. If set, the site will be at yoursite.com/space instead of the root. Leave empty for root deployment.

customTarget.label: Deploy to a different server path
customTarget.help: By default, the build deploys to the current server root (where the public and secure folders already live). Check this to specify a different target path.

targetPath.label: Target Path
targetPath.help: Absolute path on the server where the build will be deployed. The public and secure folders will be created as children of this path.

deletePrevious.label: Delete existing build first
deletePrevious.help: If a build with this name already exists, delete it before creating a new one. Useful when rebuilding to avoid stale files.

overwrite.label: Overwrite existing files
overwrite.help: If checked, existing files at the target path will be replaced. Otherwise the deploy will abort if conflicts are found.

freshStart.title: Fresh Start
freshStart.description: Reset the project to a clean state. Deletes all routes (except home), assets, and extra languages.

keepAssets.label: Keep Assets
keepAssets.help: If checked, uploaded images and files will NOT be deleted

keepLanguages.label: Keep Languages
keepLanguages.help: If checked, additional languages will NOT be removed

setupLanguages.title: Setup Languages
setupLanguages.description: Configure project languages and multilingual support. Add languages, set the default, and enable/disable multilingual mode.

multilingual.label: 🌐 Enable multilingual support
multilingual.help: Enable to support multiple languages with a language switcher

languages.label: Languages
languages.help: Select all languages your website will support

defaultLanguage.label: Default language
defaultLanguage.help: The primary language of your website

updateLangSwitch.title: Update Language Switch
updateLangSwitch.description: Rebuild the language switch component based on the current project languages.

preview.title: Visual Editor
preview.subtitle: Preview and interact with your website in real-time
preview.consentBannerToggleHint: Show or hide the cookie banner in this preview (does not persist)
preview.consentPopupToggleHint: Show or hide the cookie preferences popup in this preview (does not persist)
preview.componentNameInvalid: Invalid name. Use only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
preview.componentNameExists: A component with this name already exists.
preview.confirmDeleteComponent: Delete component "%s"? This cannot be undone.
preview.deleteLastTextWarning:
This is the last element containing text content. Deleting it will create a text-less component (styling shape only). The resulting element must have dimensions set via CSS to remain visible.

Continue?
preview.componentWarning: Editing component template - changes affect all :count usage(s)
preview.aiToolsEmpty: No tools match the current filters.
preview.aiToolsManualBadgeTooltip: Steps-only workflow — runs commands without AI
preview.aiToolsSectionGeneralPromptHint: The final prompt will appear here after you click Run.
preview.aiToolsSectionModelConfigure: Configure one in the AI Connections page.
preview.aiToolsParamOptionsDeferred: Options loaded when you run the workflow.
preview.aiToolsYourPromptPlaceholder: Describe what you want — type, style, content, anything specific. Leave empty for a general result.
preview.aiToolsGeneralPromptPlaceholder: Click Generate to assemble the final prompt.
preview.aiToolsAiResponseHint: Paste the AI's JSON reply here (or click Run if your connection sends it directly).
preview.aiToolsRunBlockedTooltip: Fix the highlighted parameters before running.
preview.aiToolsRunBlockedAiResponse: Paste the AI's JSON reply (or click Generate + Send first).
preview.aiToolsCopyHint: Copy this to your AI assistant, then paste the reply below.
preview.aiToolsStepsParseError: No commands available from current response.
preview.aiToolsBackupWarning: AI tools modify your site directly. Changes cannot be easily reverted.
preview.aiToolsBackupRecommendation: We recommend creating a backup before running any workflow you're not sure about.
preview.aiToolsSelectorEmpty: No element selected — click one in the iframe.
preview.aiToolsImportInvalid: Selected file isn't a valid workflow JSON.
preview.aiToolsDeleteCustomConfirm: Delete custom workflow "{title}"? Its JSON, prompt template, and translations sidecar will be removed.
preview.aiToolsAutoExecHint: Auto-executing in 1.5s — edit response to cancel
preview.aiToolsCopyFailedToast: Could not auto-copy — use the Copy button or Ctrl+C
preview.translationEmptyHint: No translation keys yet. Add a text key from Add Element → Text.
preview.translationRemoveUnusedHint: Delete all unused keys across the whole site (site-wide, not just current scope).
preview.translationNoMatches: No keys match the current filters.
preview.translationStatusUsedHint: Keys referenced by your site AND translated for this language.
preview.translationStatusUnsetHint: Keys referenced by your site but missing or empty in this language.
preview.translationStatusUnusedHint: Keys translated for this language but no longer referenced by any page or component.
preview.translationBulkDeleteHeader: These {n} unused keys will be deleted from {lang}.json:
preview.editParamsSaveComingSlice3: Saving lands in slice 3 — for now just verify pre-population
preview.cannotEditRoot: Cannot edit the page root — select a child element
preview.discardUnsavedParams: You have unsaved param changes. Discard?
preview.snippetIdInvalid: ID must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, dashes
preview.confirmDeleteSnippet: Delete snippet "%s"? This action cannot be undone.
preview.componentPlaceholderInfo: Text keys will be converted to {{placeholder}} variables automatically.

example.paragraph: This is a paragraph of text. It demonstrates how a paragraph element displays content with proper line height and spacing.
example.quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
example.videoNotSupported: Your browser does not support video.
example.audioNotSupported: Your browser does not support audio.
example.name: Name

tagDesc.div: Defines a generic section or container in a document
tagDesc.section: Defines a thematic grouping of content with its own theme
tagDesc.article: Defines independent, self-contained content that can be distributed separately
tagDesc.header: Defines introductory content or navigational aids for a page or section
tagDesc.footer: Defines footer content typically containing author, copyright, or related links
tagDesc.nav: Defines a set of navigation links for site navigation
tagDesc.main: Defines the dominant content of the body unique to the document
tagDesc.aside: Defines content tangentially related to the main content (sidebar)
tagDesc.figure: Defines self-contained content like illustrations, diagrams, or photos with optional caption
tagDesc.figcaption: Defines a caption or legend for a figure element
tagDesc.p: Defines a paragraph of text content
tagDesc.h1: Defines a first-level heading, the most important headline
tagDesc.h2: Defines a second-level heading for major sections
tagDesc.h3: Defines a third-level heading for subsections
tagDesc.h6: Defines a sixth-level heading, the smallest
tagDesc.span: Defines a generic inline container for phrasing content
tagDesc.strong: Defines text with strong importance, typically displayed in bold
tagDesc.em: Defines emphasized text, typically displayed in italic
tagDesc.small: Defines side comments and small print like disclaimers
tagDesc.mark: Defines highlighted or marked text for reference purposes
tagDesc.blockquote: Defines an extended quotation from another source
tagDesc.pre: Defines preformatted text preserving whitespace and line breaks
tagDesc.code: Defines a fragment of computer code
tagDesc.q: Defines a short inline quotation with automatic quote marks
tagDesc.cite: Defines the title of a creative work being referenced
tagDesc.abbr: Defines an abbreviation or acronym with optional full expansion
tagDesc.time: Defines a specific date, time, or duration in machine-readable format
tagDesc.address: Defines contact information for the author or owner
tagDesc.a: Defines a hyperlink to another page or resource
tagDesc.button: Creates a clickable button for user interactions
tagDesc.details: Creates an interactive disclosure widget that shows/hides content
tagDesc.summary: Defines the visible heading for a details element
tagDesc.dialog: Defines a dialog box or interactive modal window
tagDesc.ul: Defines an unordered list with bullet points
tagDesc.ol: Defines an ordered list with numbered items
tagDesc.li: Defines a list item within an ordered or unordered list
tagDesc.dl: Defines a description list with term-description pairs
tagDesc.dt: Defines a term to be described in a description list
tagDesc.dd: Defines the description or definition for a term
tagDesc.img: Embeds an image in the document
tagDesc.picture: Defines a container for multiple image sources for responsive images
tagDesc.video: Embeds video content with playback controls
tagDesc.audio: Embeds audio content with playback controls
tagDesc.iframe: Embeds another HTML page within the current page
tagDesc.embed: Embeds external content like plugins or media
tagDesc.object: Defines an embedded external resource or media object
tagDesc.source: Defines multiple media sources for video/audio elements
tagDesc.track: Defines text tracks like subtitles for media elements
tagDesc.canvas: Provides a drawing area for graphics via scripting (JavaScript)
tagDesc.svg: Defines a container for SVG vector graphics
tagDesc.form: Creates a form for user input that can be submitted to a server
tagDesc.input: Creates an interactive control for data entry (text, checkbox, radio, etc.)
tagDesc.textarea: Creates a multi-line text input field
tagDesc.label: Defines a label for a form control, improving accessibility
tagDesc.option: Defines an option within a select dropdown
tagDesc.optgroup: Groups related options within a select dropdown
tagDesc.fieldset: Groups related form controls with an optional border
tagDesc.legend: Defines a caption for a fieldset element
tagDesc.datalist: Provides a list of predefined options for autocomplete
tagDesc.output: Displays the result of a calculation or user action
tagDesc.progress: Displays task completion progress (loading, uploading, etc.)
tagDesc.meter: Displays a scalar measurement within a known range
tagDesc.table: Creates a table for displaying tabular data
tagDesc.thead: Groups header rows in a table
tagDesc.tbody: Groups body rows in a table
tagDesc.tfoot: Groups footer rows in a table
tagDesc.tr: Defines a row of cells in a table
tagDesc.th: Defines a header cell in a table
tagDesc.td: Defines a standard data cell in a table
tagDesc.caption: Defines a caption or title for a table
tagDesc.colgroup: Groups one or more columns for formatting
tagDesc.col: Specifies properties for a table column
tagDesc.br: Creates a line break within text
tagDesc.hr: Creates a horizontal rule (thematic break) between sections
tagDesc.wbr: Defines a possible line break opportunity within a word
tagDesc.b: Defines text that should be stylistically bold without extra importance
tagDesc.i: Defines text in an alternate voice or mood, typically italic
tagDesc.u: Defines text that should have a non-textual annotation (underline)
tagDesc.s: Defines text that is no longer accurate or relevant (strikethrough)
tagDesc.del: Defines text that has been deleted from the document
tagDesc.ins: Defines text that has been inserted into the document
tagDesc.kbd: Defines keyboard input that the user should enter
tagDesc.samp: Defines sample output from a computer program
tagDesc.var: Defines a mathematical variable or programming variable
tagDesc.dfn: Defines a term being defined within context
tagDesc.menu: Defines a list of commands or menu items
tagDesc.map: Defines a client-side image map with clickable areas
tagDesc.area: Defines a clickable area within an image map
tagDesc.data: Links content with a machine-readable value
tagDesc.bdi: Isolates bidirectional text that might be formatted differently
tagDesc.ruby: Defines ruby annotations for East Asian typography
tagDesc.rt: Defines the pronunciation of characters in ruby annotations
tagDesc.rp: Defines parentheses for browsers that don't support ruby
tagDesc.slot: Defines a placeholder for web component content
tagDesc.portal: Embeds a preview of another page for seamless navigation

preview.textHintTranslation: Enter a translation key. Value will be looked up in translations.
preview.textHintVariable: Enter variable name (without {{ }}). Value will be passed from parent.
preview.textHintRaw: Enter raw text. This will be displayed as-is.

preview.variableCollisionHint: These variables exist in both parent and child:

preview.textOnlyEditNotice: This is a text node. Edit translations using the Translations page.
preview.confirmDeleteNode: Are you sure you want to delete this element?
preview.textKeyEditNotice: Text content is edited through the Translations page. The keys shown above are translation references.
preview.componentNoEditableVars: This component has no editable variables.
preview.dragSelectHint: Click to select, arrows to navigate, hold to drag
preview.dragLockedHint: Element locked — drag to move, click to re-select
preview.styleNotice: Quick CSS tweaks. For complex styling, edit the SCSS file directly.
preview.jsNotice: Manage JavaScript interactions for the selected element.
preview.noInteractions: No interactions yet. Click an element to add one.
preview.selectEventAndFunction: Please select an event and function
preview.noRouteParams: — No :params on this route — add one at /admin/sitemap —
preview.routeParamCapturedFrom: Captured from :{name} in the route URL
preview.customTextHint: Use a raw string instead of a translation key (one-off / debug)
preview.bodySourceHint: Use #form to collect from a form, or a CSS selector. Ignored on GET/DELETE.
preview.urlHint: Supports {{lang}} and :placeholders. e.g. /users/:id/posts becomes /users/42/posts at runtime.
preview.selectEventApiUrl: Please select an event and enter a URL
preview.selectEventApiEndpoint: Please select an event, API, and endpoint
preview.nameRequiredForInput: A name is required so the field is submitted with the form.
preview.invalidId: Invalid ID — start with a letter or underscore; letters, digits, hyphens and underscores only (no spaces).

eventTooltips.onclick: When the user clicks the element
eventTooltips.ondblclick: When the user double-clicks the element
eventTooltips.onmouseenter: When the cursor enters the element
eventTooltips.onmouseleave: When the cursor leaves the element
eventTooltips.onfocus: When the element receives keyboard focus
eventTooltips.onblur: When the element loses keyboard focus
eventTooltips.onkeydown: When a key is pressed down while the element is focused
eventTooltips.onkeyup: When a key is released while the element is focused
eventTooltips.oninput: Every time the value changes (every keystroke)
eventTooltips.onchange: When the value changes and the field loses focus
eventTooltips.ontoggle: When a <details> element is opened or closed
eventTooltips.onerror: When the element fails to load
eventTooltips.onmousemove: When the cursor moves over the element
eventTooltips.onmousedown: When a mouse button is pressed over the element
eventTooltips.onmouseup: When a mouse button is released over the element
eventTooltips.oncontextmenu: When the right-click / context menu is requested
eventTooltips.ontouchstart: When a finger touches the element
eventTooltips.ontouchend: When a finger is lifted off the element
eventTooltips.ontouchmove: When a finger moves across the element
eventTooltips.onfocusin: Focus entered the element or one of its children (bubbles)
eventTooltips.onfocusout: Focus left the element or one of its children (bubbles)
eventTooltips.onpaste: When the user pastes content into the field
eventTooltips.oncopy: When the user copies content from the field
eventTooltips.oncut: When the user cuts content from the field

preview.selectorHint: Keep the CSS prefix — e.g. .my-class, #header, [data-foo]. Use "this" to target the element firing the event.
preview.classHint: Bare class name without the dot — e.g. hidden, active. Passed to classList.add().
preview.selectModeHint: Click any element in the preview to inspect it
preview.dragModeHint: Drag elements to reorder them within their container
preview.textModeHint: Click any text in the preview to edit it inline
preview.styleModeHint: Click an element to edit its style, or use the sections below
preview.jsModeHint: Click an element to manage its JavaScript interactions
preview.addModeHint: Select an element first to add siblings or children
preview.editModeHint: Select an element first to edit its structure
preview.styleSourceComingSoon: Source editor coming in the next slice
preview.styleSourceFindPlaceholder: Find… (type :N to jump to line N)
preview.styleSourceCancelConfirm: Discard unsaved changes and reload style.css from the server?
preview.styleSourceSwitchConfirm: You have unsaved Source edits. Discard them and switch?
preview.themeAddVariableAlsoOtherScope: Also add to the other scope
preview.selectorsBrowserHint: Search and select CSS selectors to edit their styles
preview.noSelectorsWithRules: No other selectors with styles found
preview.noStylesToCopy: No styles found on source selector
preview.noSelectorsWithRules: No other selectors with styles found
preview.noStylesToCopy: No styles found on source selector
preview.affectedElementsHint: Number of elements affected by this selector
preview.noStylesDefined: No styles defined for this selector
preview.noVariablesAvailable: No CSS variables available. Load the Theme tab first.
preview.varReplacementWarning: You replaced a theme variable with a fixed value. This property will no longer follow theme changes.
preview.noAnimatedSelectors: No selectors with transitions or animations
preview.confirmDeleteKeyframe: Are you sure you want to delete this keyframe?
preview.hoverStateOnlyTooltip: Selectors that change appearance in :hover, :focus, etc., without a transition declared.
preview.applyKeyframeNoSelectors: No selectors yet — add one via the Selectors tab.
preview.addTransitionExistingHint: This selector already has a transition. Submitting will overwrite it.
preview.noDirectTrigger: No direct trigger found - may be unused
preview.keyframeNameHint: Letters, numbers, hyphens. Start with letter.
preview.clickToAddFrame: Click on timeline to add frames
preview.invalidKeyframeName: Invalid keyframe name. Use letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
preview.keyframeExistsConfirm: A keyframe with this name already exists. Do you want to replace it?
preview.atLeastOneFrame: At least one frame with properties is required
preview.frameExists: A frame already exists at this percentage
preview.transformEmpty: No transform functions. Click "Add Function" to start.
preview.transitionDescription: Smoothly animates property changes when triggered (hover, focus, etc.)
preview.transitionHint: Transitions animate property changes between states. Defined on base, applies to all state changes.
preview.animationsIndependent: Animations are independent from transitions. You can use one, both, or neither.
preview.noKeyframesFound: No @keyframes found. Create one in the Animations tab first.
preview.noVariablesForNode: No variables or parameters for this node
preview.variablesPlaceholderTranslation: Search or type a translation key
preview.variablesHintVariable: {{}} added automatically — use CAPS by convention
preview.variablesHintRaw: __RAW__ added automatically — same in all languages
preview.variablesHintEnum: Resolved from enum definition at render time
preview.noEnumsDefined: No enums defined for this component
preview.enumTypeOverrideTip: Click to override type for this row
preview.enumNeedsOptions: At least one option is required
preview.noVariablesToEmulate: No variables found in this component
preview.stateStoresCount: Number of state stores on this page
preview.stateStoreFieldsHint: The field name is the request key. init = initial value (pick a source kind + key, or leave blank to use the default). from = response path the value comes from (e.g. data.items).
preview.stateStoreImportPick: Pick a store from another page
preview.stateStoreImportNone: No stores on other pages to import
preview.stateStoreImportRename: Rename (store id already exists on this page):
preview.stateStoreInvalidId: Invalid store id (use letters, digits, _ or -)
preview.keepTranslationKeysHint: Keep the translation key in language files after deleting the node
preview.responseMappingHint: Map API response fields to page elements
preview.noResponseSchema: No response schema defined for this endpoint
preview.containerSelectorHint: Container element whose first child is the template. Each array item clones it.
preview.emptyTextHint: Text shown when the array is empty
preview.listModeHint: Uses data-bind attributes inside the container's first child as item template.

apis.title: API Registry
apis.subtitle: Manage external API endpoints for use in interactions

empty.title: No APIs Defined
empty.description: Create your first API definition to start connecting external services.

form.name: Display Name
form.baseUrlHint: The root URL for all endpoints (e.g., https://api.example.com)
form.storageKeyHint: Name of the variable in storage (e.g., 'authToken'). At runtime, the token will be read from this location.
form.storageConfig: config (public key in JS - USE WITH CAUTION)
form.configWarning: Warning: Tokens stored in 'config' are compiled into JavaScript and visible to all site visitors. Only use this for publishable/public API keys (like Stripe publishable keys or Google Maps API keys) that are designed to be client-side.
form.pathHint: Path relative to base URL (e.g., /users or /contact)
form.schemaHint: Uses standard JSON Schema format. Click Template to get started.
form.endpointAuthHint: Override API-level auth for this endpoint
form.callableFromHint: Server-only endpoints are filtered out of qs-api-config.js — the browser can't call them. Use for endpoints whose secrets must stay server-side.
form.parametersHint: Use :name in the path for path-segment params (e.g. /users/:id). Other params go to the query string at fetch time.
form.refreshEndpointHint: Endpoint that issues a new access token when the current one expires. Called automatically on a 401 response.
form.refreshTokenKeyHint: Where the refresh token is stored at runtime. Restricted to browser storage — 'config' would publish the token to every visitor.
form.refreshBodyField: Body field name for refresh token
form.refreshBodyFieldHint: The field in the refresh endpoint's POST body that carries the stored refresh token (sent as {<field>: <value>}).
form.refreshResponseTokenPathHint: Dot-path in the refresh response where the new access token lives (e.g. token or data.access_token).
form.refreshResponseRefreshTokenPathHint: Dot-path for the rotated refresh token, if your endpoint returns one. Leave blank to keep the existing refresh token.

test.authTokenHint: Click save to remember for this API

importModal.warning: Importing will merge with existing APIs. APIs with the same ID will be overwritten.
importModal.baseUrlFixer: Set absolute base URL (must start with http:// or https://)
importModal.previewJson: Converted JSON (edit before import if needed)
importModal.previewJsonHint: Edits here take effect on Import. Use this to fine-tune schemas or descriptions before saving.
